expectations.evidence: opencollection.yml exists with name: Webhook Payment Receiver, version: 1, type: collection
No folder-level before-request script exists. HMAC signing is duplicated inline in each individual test file's script.pre-request block instead of a shared folder-level script.
Separate test files exist: payment-completed/payment-completed.yml (payment.completed), payment-failed/payment-failed.yml (payment.failed), payment-refunded/payment-refunded.yml (payment.refunded)
missing-signature/missing-signature.yml asserts: expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(401) and omits X-Webhook-Signature header
invalid-signature/invalid-signature.yml sends hardcoded wrong signature 'deadbeef...' and asserts expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(401)
invalid-json/invalid-json.yml sends body type: text with '{invalid json content, not parseable' and asserts expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(400)
duplicate-event/duplicate-event.yml reuses evt_payment_completed_001 ID and asserts expect(res.getStatus()).to.equal(409)
All HMAC scripts use bru.getEnvVar('webhookSecret') to load the secret; environments/local.yml defines webhookSecret as a secret variable. No hardcoded secret in scripts.
